name: moonstone
description: Personal ATProto PDS — no Bluesky infra defaults, Rust identity via rsky

scripts.build: pnpm run build:native && pnpm run build:ts
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:native && pnpm -r --filter '!@moonstone/native' run dev
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec -- rm -rf dist && pnpm --filter @moonstone/native clean
